SEARCH
Package project_biu.servlets

Interface Servlet

All Known Implementing Classes:
ConfLoader, HtmlLoader, TopicDisplayer, TopicReset
public interface Servlet
Pluggable HTTP request handler.

Implementations are registered with a MyHTTPServer against a specific HTTP verb and URI prefix; the server invokes handle(RequestInfo, OutputStream) for every request whose verb and URI prefix the implementation owns. Implementations are responsible for writing the full HTTP response (status line, headers, blank line, body) to toClient.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close()
    Release any resources the servlet is holding.
    void
    handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo ri, OutputStream toClient)
    Process a parsed request and write the full HTTP response (status line, headers, blank line, body) to toClient.

  • Method Details

    • handle

      void handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo ri, OutputStream toClient) throws IOException
      Process a parsed request and write the full HTTP response (status line, headers, blank line, body) to toClient.
      Parameters:
      ri - parsed request — URI, parameters, content bytes
      toClient - the socket's output stream; the implementation must write a syntactically valid HTTP response here
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing to the socket fails (network error, client closed prematurely, …)

    • close

      void close() throws IOException
      Release any resources the servlet is holding. Called by HTTPServer.close() when the server is shutting down.
      Throws:
      IOException - if cleanup fails
